name: ConstructionPlane
summary: Represents a construction plane inside the document. Use Rhino.DocObjects.Tables.NamedConstructionPlaneTable methods and indexers to add and access a ConstructionPlane.

constructors.name: ConstructionPlane
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of ConstructionPlane.

properties.name: DepthBuffered
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the grid is drawn on top of geometry. false=grid is always drawn behind 3d geometrytrue=grid is drawn at its depth as a 3d plane and grid lines obscure things behind the grid.

properties.name: GridLineCount
properties.summary: Gets or sets the total amount of grid lines in each direction.

properties.name: GridSpacing
properties.summary: Gets or sets the distance between grid lines.

properties.name: GridXColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the grid X-axis mark.

properties.name: GridYColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the grid Y-axis mark.

properties.name: GridZColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the grid Z-axis mark.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the construction plane.

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Gets or sets the geometric plane to use for construction.

properties.name: ShowAxes
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the axes of the grid should be visible.

properties.name: ShowGrid
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the grid itself should be visible.

properties.name: ShowZAxis
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the Z axis of the grid should be visible.

properties.name: SnapSpacing
properties.summary: when "grid snap" is enabled, the distance between snap points. Typically this is the same distance as grid spacing.

properties.name: ThickLineColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the thicker, wider line.

properties.name: ThickLineFrequency
properties.summary: Gets or sets the recurrence of a wider line on the grid. 0: No lines are thick, all are drawn thin.1: All lines are thick.2: Every other line is thick.3: One line in three lines is thick (and two are thin).4: ...

properties.name: ThinLineColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the thinner, less prominent line.
